---
name: Compliance Finding
about: Track a control gap, weakness, or assessment finding
title: "[Finding] "
labels: finding
assignees: ''
---

## Summary
Describe the finding.

## Control ID
Example: CM-6

## Source
Assessment, audit, internal review, scan, or stakeholder review.

## Risk Level
Low, Moderate, High

## Impact
Describe the compliance or security impact.

## Recommended Remediation
Describe the corrective action.

## Evidence Reference
Link to the evidence record or artifact location.

## Target Date
Add the target completion date.
